name: sk-doc
description: Documentation & OpenCode-component authoring parent hub. One advisor identity that routes through mode-registry.json + hub-router.json to ten nested workflow packets: create-skill (+ create-skill-parent), create-readme (install guides folded), create-agent, create-command, create-feature-catalog, create-manual-testing-playbook, create-benchmark, create-flowchart, create-changelog, and doc-quality (validate/score/optimize an existing doc). The universal doc-quality pipeline — validators, global standards, frontmatter/llms/template assets — lives once in shared/ and is consumed by every packet. Workflow-only hub: no surface axis, zero named extensions.
trigger_examples: write a README / install guide for this folder
